content.en:
Mohe Valley.

Ye Tian and an Eternal Realm Primary-Order Realm God Divine Realm of the Mid-Force Blue Sect were discussing the Eternal Demon Pillar transaction.

This realm god of the Blue Sect is called the Tianya Realm God, and he has condensed two eternal realm spirits, and his strength is not bad.

Ye Tian also learned from this Tianya Realm God that the Blue Sect had an Eternal Demon Pillar.

"Tianya Realm God, I want to buy the Eternal Demon Pillar of the Blue Sect, I can take out some treasures that will help condense the Eternal Realm Spirit!" Ye Tian said.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, what treasures can you take out?"

The God of the End of Heaven asked.

Some treasures can increase the success rate of condensing the Eternal Realm Spirit, but the side effects are too great, the Blue Sect definitely doesn't want it, don't succeed in condensing the Eternal Realm Spirit at that time, but the result is that the Eternal Dao Seed becomes a demon seed.

Then it's not a chance, it's a disaster!

Ye Tian casually said that there were several treasure resources, all of which he obtained when he was in the Eternal Realm, which could help to impact the Eternal Realm Divine Realm and condense the Eternal Realm Spirit, although it was far inferior to the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, but it could also increase the success rate by two or three percent, and if added together, the success rate was still good.

Of course, it is only suitable for condensing the first Eternal Realm Spirit, if it is given to the Realm God who has already condensed the Eternal Realm Spirit, to condense the second or third Eternal Realm Spirit, then the effect will naturally be very poor.

The gods of the Tianya Realm were still quite satisfied with the few treasures that Ye Tian said, and the side effects were not great.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, I need to discuss it with the leader of our Blue Sect before I can give you an answer. "The Divine Way of the End of the World.

"Okay, I'll wait here!"

Ye Tian smiled.

......

Blue Sect.

The God of the Tianya Realm is discussing the transaction of the Eternal Demon Pillar with the leader of the Blue Sect, the Star Yun Realm God.

"Chief, the Ye Heaven Realm God wants to exchange a few treasures that will help condense the Eternal Realm Spirit for the Eternal Demon Pillar of our Blue Sect, do you want to trade?" asked the Heaven Ending Realm God.

The Star Yun Realm God frowned slightly and said, "Ye Tian Realm God, this Realm God, I also investigated, it is the lord from the Terran Holy Country, and he only single-handedly suppressed the Old Sun Mountain not long ago. The old Sun Realm God in the Old Sun Mountain is also very good, and he is far from being the opponent of the Ye Tian Realm God, this Ye Tian Realm God is very mysterious. He wants to trade the Eternal Demon Pillar, could it be that he has researched the results and can use the Eternal Demon Pillar? Or will he trade the Eternal Demon Pillar with the Demon Seed Abyss~?"

Tianya Realm God said: "Chief, in the realm of the Realm God Realm, he is not the only force that wants to trade the Eternal Demon Pillar, but the price offered by some forces is too low, so we have not taken the initiative to contact those forces." Now, the price offered by the Ye Heavenly Realm God is good, let's just sell it! The function of the Eternal Demon Pillar is to refine the Eternal Dao Seed, at most, they have studied the risk of avoiding the Demon Seed, but even if they can plan, the price they pay is still terrifying. "

The Star Yun Realm God pondered for a while, and finally decided to sell the Eternal Demon Pillar to Ye Tian.

"Okay, then sell it!"

The gods of the Star Rhyme Realm responded.

Soon after.

Lan Zong started trading with Ye Tian, and the trading location was in the Mohe Valley.

Soon, Ye Tian completed the deal with the Blue Sect and obtained an Eternal Demon Pillar.

This Eternal Demon Pillar was sealed layer by layer by the Blue Sect, but the seal was not complicated, and Ye Tian would soon be able to unlock it.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for forces to trade the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Soon after, he made another deal with a mid-level power known as the Withered Vine Chamber of Commerce, from whom he obtained an Eternal Pillar.

"It seems that many forces have eternal magic pillars!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Some of the Eternal Pillars were obtained in the Eternal Realm, and then those forces that obtained the Eternal Pillars moved to the Realm God Realm, which has left these Eternal Pillars behind.

However, most of the Eternal Demon Pillars were obtained in the gap between the realm of the Realm of God and the abyss of the Demon Seed.

Of course, it was not the Eternal Demon Pillar that was conceived and obtained by them, but the Eternal Demon Pillar that was killed with the Demon Seed, killed the Demon Seed, and captured the Eternal Demon Pillar on the Demon Seed.

In the abyss of the demon seed, the Eternal Demon Pillar is not too rare, and some demon seeds use it as a weapon, and once the demon seed is killed, you can obtain the Eternal Demon Pillar.

Ye Tian had killed a lot of demon seeds in the Eternal Realm before, and he had obtained the Eternal Demon Pillar from several of them.

In addition, there are a few places where the Eternal Pillar can also be born.

In this way, many forces in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom have Eternal Demon Pillars.

It's just that some of the Eternal Pillars have been bought by some top forces, and there are not many forces that really still have the Eternal Pillars.

The years passed.

Ye Tian traded with a total of five forces before and after, and obtained five Eternal Demon Pillars.

After that, he hadn't heard of any middle force that had the Eternal Demon Pillar in his hands, and maybe some forces still had the Eternal Demon Pillar, but they wouldn't trade it.

......

Terran Holy Country.

Ye Tian came back from the Mohe Valley, and at this time, there were more than a dozen Eternal Demon Pillars, Chilin Ancient Spears, and several other treasures similar to the Eternal Demon Pillars inside his Eternal Dao Seed, all of which were refining his Eternal Dao Seed with all their might.

This refining speed is very good, but the aura emanating from these treasures such as the Eternal Demon Seed and the Chilin Ancient Spear will also make other Eternal Dao Seeds of the Eternal Dao Realm turn into Demon Seeds.

Due to the number of Eternal Demon Pillars, Ye Tian was unable to completely conceal his aura.

Therefore, no one else is allowed to approach the place where he retreats, otherwise other Eternal Dao realms will be eroded if they are not careful, and thus turn into a demon seed, even if they stay for a long time in the high-level Eternal Dao Seed, they will not be able to bear it, and they will definitely be demonized.

But for the Perfection-level Eternal Dao Species, there was naturally no threat at all.

In the following years, Ye Tian was very low (good money) and did not provoke any forces.

He just wanted to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to its current limit as soon as possible, so as to condense the third Eternal Realm Spirit.

And the Terran Holy Realm is getting stronger and stronger, and many Terran Eternal Dao Realms have gained some opportunities in the Realm God Kingdom Realm, but there are also many Eternal Dao Realms that have fallen everywhere, which is an inevitable situation.

As for the Endless Realm Alliance at the Eternal Border, it is also developing rapidly.

Ye Tian continued to open up the Eternal Realm and issue the Eternal Decree, gradually making the number of Eternal Realms of the Endless Realm Alliance approaching a thousand.

However, just after the number of the Endless Realm Alliance reached more than nine hundred, Ye Tian temporarily stopped opening up the Eternal Realm.

It's not that he doesn't want the Endless Realm Alliance to become a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance, it's that once it becomes a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance, it will inevitably attract the attention of the Realm, and it will be impossible to keep a low profile when the time comes.
